children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: To assist States in meeting the requirements of , the Secretary shall allot to the States the amounts appropriated under and not reserved under paragraph (6). Allotments and reallotments of such sums shall be made on the same basis as the allotments and reallotments are made under subsections (a)(1)(A) and (e) of , except as provided in paragraph (2).section 15043(a) of this titlesection 15045 of this titlesection 15022 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: to each of American Samoa, Guam, the United States Virgin Islands, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands may not be less than $107,000; and

children.label: ii
children.text: to any State not described in clause (i) may not be less than $200,000; or

children.label: i
children.text: to each of American Samoa, Guam, the United States Virgin Islands, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands may not be less than $80,000; and

children.label: ii
children.text: to any State not described in clause (i) may not be less than $150,000.

children.heading: Reduction of allotment
children.label: 3 Reduction of allotment
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraphs (1) and (2), if the aggregate of the amounts to be allotted to the States pursuant to such paragraphs for any fiscal year exceeds the total amount appropriated for such allotments under for such fiscal year, the amount to be allotted to each State for such fiscal year shall be proportionately reduced.section 15045 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the total amount appropriated under for the fiscal year for which the increase in the minimum allotment is being made; minussection 15045 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the total amount appropriated under (or a corresponding provision) for the immediately preceding fiscal year,section 15045 of this title

children.heading: Monitoring the administration of the system
children.label: 5 Monitoring the administration of the system
children.text: In a State in which the system is housed in a State agency, the State may use not more than 5 percent of any allotment under this subsection for the costs of monitoring the administration of the system required under .section 15043(a) of this title

children.heading: Technical assistance and American Indian consortium
children.label: 6 Technical assistance and American Indian consortium
A
children.text: use not more than 2 percent of the amount appropriated to provide technical assistance to eligible systems with respect to activities carried out under this part (consistent with requests by such systems for such assistance for the year); and

children.label: B
children.text: provide a grant in accordance with , and in an amount described in paragraph (2)(A)(i), to an American Indian consortium to provide protection and advocacy services.section 15043(b) of this title

children.heading: Payment to systems
children.label: b Payment to systems
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary shall pay directly to any system in a State that complies with the provisions of this part the amount of the allotment made for the State under this section, unless the system specifies otherwise.

children.heading: Unobligated funds
children.label: c Unobligated funds
children.text: Any amount paid to a system under this part for a fiscal year and remaining unobligated at the end of such year shall remain available to such system for the next fiscal year, for the purposes for which such amount was paid.
